claim: Gemini 3 Pro Image (Nano Banana Pro) integrates Gemini 3 Pro's reasoning for complex image generation and reasoning over images.
actionable: Use Nano Banana Pro for image generation tasks requiring reasoning or composition; it handles image editing, grounding with search, and aspect ratio control.

claim: Grounding with Google Search: image generation models can look up real-time information via search and use that knowledge to generate accurate images.
actionable: Enable search grounding in image generation; this allows agents to generate images of real-world locations with current weather, landmarks, and state.

claim: Gemini 3 Pro reasoning applied to image generation: models reason about the scene, develop a concept, generate the image, then self-analyze against requirements.
actionable: When generating complex images, provide detailed requirements; the model will reason through them and may regenerate if the output doesn't match.

claim: Text rendering in image generation: Nano Banana Pro is highly accurate at rendering text in images, including non-Latin scripts and custom formatting.
actionable: Use Nano Banana Pro for infographics, blueprints, and text-heavy designs; it reliably renders text accurately in multiple languages.

claim: Image composition: models can combine multiple input images into a single coherent composition with correct relative positioning and style.
actionable: For mood boards, fashion looks, or multi-element designs, provide separate images and ask the model to compose them; it maintains consistency across elements.

claim: Gemini 3 Pro has cultural and geographic knowledge: when generating images (e.g., graffiti in Melbourne), it includes context-appropriate details (trams, lane locations).
actionable: Leverage the model's world knowledge for location-specific image generation; include city names or landmarks to improve authenticity.
